tasks.subject: Task 1: Hoist ensureOwned to a shared helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the thread-ownership check used by GET/POST into a colocated `_shared.ts` so the new DELETE handler can reuse it.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/_shared.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_shared.ts` exports `ensureOwned(threadId, userId): Promise<boolean>` mirroring current behavior
- [ ] `route.ts` imports from `./_shared` and no longer defines the helper locally
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint` pass
- [ ] Existing route tests still pass

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/_shared.ts", "src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_shared.ts exports ensureOwned", "route.ts imports from ./_shared", "typecheck + lint pass", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: DELETE /api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId] handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the DELETE route — owner-checked, deletes the storage blob (best-effort) and the documents row (cascade drops chunks).

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId]/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId]/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 401 when unauthenticated
- [ ] 404 when thread not owned
- [ ] 404 when document not in thread
- [ ] 204 happy path; deleteDocumentBlob called before adminDb.deleteFrom
- [ ] 204 still returned when blob delete throws; DB delete still runs; console.warn called
- [ ] Tests cover all 5 cases

**Verify:** `pnpm test src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId]/route.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId]/route.ts", "src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId]/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test src/app/api/threads/[id]/documents/[documentId]/route.test.ts && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 unauthenticated", "404 not-owned thread", "404 doc not in thread", "204 happy path with correct order", "204 on blob-delete failure with warn"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: useThreadDocuments — DELETE realtime + detach callback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a `detach(documentId)` callback that optimistically removes the chip and rolls back on non-2xx (excluding 404). Add a third realtime subscription for DELETE events.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/(authed)/chat/use-thread-documents.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Hook returns `{ documents, refresh, detach }`
- [ ] `detach` is a no-op when no active threadId
- [ ] Optimistically removes; on 2xx or 404 keeps removed
- [ ] On other error: restores chip at original index and rethrows
- [ ] Third `.on('postgres_changes', { event: 'DELETE', ... })` subscription added; removes row by `payload.old.id`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint` pass

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/(authed)/chat/use-thread-documents.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hook returns detach", "optimistic remove with rollback", "404 treated as success", "DELETE realtime subscription added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DocumentChipRail — X button + confirmation dialog + pending state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a per-chip detach control. Clicking X opens a confirmation dialog; confirming invokes onDetach(id). Spinner replaces the X while the request is in flight.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Accepts `onDetach: (id: string) => Promise<void> | void`
- [ ] X is hidden by default, revealed on group-hover; always visible on failed chips
- [ ] Clicking X opens AlertDialog with title 'Detach document' + document name
- [ ] Cancel does not call onDetach
- [ ] Confirm calls onDetach(id); spinner shown during in-flight call
- [ ] On reject: error message surfaced; chip remains
- [ ] 5 tests pass

**Verify:** `pnpm test src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.tsx", "src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test src/app/(authed)/chat/document-chip-rail.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onDetach prop accepted", "X visible on hover/failed", "AlertDialog opens with name", "Cancel does not invoke", "Confirm calls onDetach", "spinner during in-flight"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire detach into chat-view.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Destructure `detach` from the hook and pass it to `DocumentChipRail` as `onDetach`. Run full verification + manual smoke test.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/(authed)/chat/chat-view.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `useThreadDocuments` destructure includes `detach`
- [ ] `<DocumentChipRail documents={documents} onDetach={detach} />`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test` all green
- [ ] Manual smoke test (sections 1-6 in Task 5 of plan) passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/(authed)/chat/chat-view.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["detach destructured", "onDetach prop wired", "full suite green", "manual smoke test pass"]}
```
